title: Rustins Cellulose Thinners 125ml -– Professional Solvent for Cellulose Paints and Lacquers; Cleans Brushes, Spray Guns and Equipment; Fast-Evaporating Formula in Various Sizes
features: High-Performance Thinner and Cleaner – Rustins Cellulose Thinners provides an efficient way to thin cellulose-based paints and lacquers; ensures smooth application and consistent flow for professional results

. Multi-Purpose Solvent for Tools – Perfect for cleaning paint brushes, spray guns and other application tools after use; removes tough residues and maintains equipment performance for long-term reliability
Fast-Evaporating Formula – Designed to evaporate quickly without leaving residue or streaks; enhances drying time and finish quality when used with cellulose coatings; ADD TO BASKET now
Reliable and Versatile Use – Suitable for automotive, furniture, and household finishing projects; compatible with most cellulose-based coatings for effective thinning and cleaning applications

Trusted Rustins Expertise – Manufactured by a long-established UK brand recognised for sustainable and good-quality woodcare and surface preparation products; delivers consistent, dependable performance every time
